description: Create a soccer corner kick strategy diagram in Wondershare EdrawMax. The diagram should feature a top-down soccer field with a ball placed at a corner arc. Arrange 5 attacking players (red), 4 defending players (blue), and 1 goalkeeper (yellow or green) within the penalty area. Include a curved arrow showing the ball's path to the penalty spot and a straight arrow showing an attacker's run. Add a text label at the top titled 'Corner Routine: Near Post Attack'. Save the editable file to /home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.eddx and export the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.jpg.
